{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Remnant of the Blood Sage
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Remnant of the Blood Sage]] would be useful if it could cooperate.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
